name: Daily Briefing
description: Research scans feeds → Main summarizes → Mail drafts email

steps.action: Scan RSS feeds and blog monitors for notable news from the last 24 hours. Write a summary to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Daily Research Summary'.
Scan AI news feeds for notable updates from the last 24 hours. Write a summary to shared/inbox/main/ with subject 'Daily AI Research Summary'.
Read research summaries from inbox. Combine into a concise daily briefing. Send to shared/inbox/mail/ with subject 'Daily Briefing Draft'.
Read the daily briefing from inbox. Draft an email to Anthony with the combined summary. Save as draft — do not send without approval.
